---
title: "02_DataExploration"
author: "Sushant Agellu"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```


```{r}

gse_id <- "GSE60424"

metadata <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_metadata_clean.csv")))
counts <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_counts_clean.csv")))

dim(metadata)
dim(counts)

```



```{r}
names(metadata)
head(metadata)

summary(metadata)

table(metadata$diseasestatus_ch1)
table(metadata$gender_ch1)
```



```{r}
ggplot(metadata, aes(x = diseasestatus_ch1, fill = diseasestatus_ch1)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Healthy Control" = "green",
    "Type 1 Diabetes" = "red",
    "Sepsis" = "blue",
    "ALS" = "purple",
    "MS pretreatment" = "orange",
    "MS posttreatment" = "brown"
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Samples by Disease Status",
       x = "Disease Status",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Disease") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

```{r}

head(counts[, 1:6])

# remove gene_id column and keep only numeric expression values
expr_only <- counts[, -1]

dim(expr_only)
summary(expr_only[, 1:5])
```

```{r}
sample_totals <- colSums(expr_only)

sample_totals_df <- data.frame(
  sample = names(sample_totals),
  total_counts = sample_totals
)

ggplot(sample_totals_df, aes(x = total_counts)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Total Counts per Sample",
       x = "Total Counts",
       y = "Number of Samples")
```

```{r}
expr_log <- log2(expr_only + 1)
summary(expr_log[, 1:5])
```
```{r}

# #  Subset metadata (ALS vs Healthy)
# metadata_sub <- metadata %>%
#   filter(diseasestatus_ch1 %in% c("ALS", "Healthy Control"))
# 
# #  Expression matrix
# expr_matrix <- as.matrix(counts[, -1])
# 
# expr_log <- log2(expr_matrix + 1)
# 
# samples_keep <- metadata_sub$title
# expr_sub <- expr_log[, samples_keep]
# 
# 
# keep_genes <- apply(expr_sub, 1, var) > 0
# expr_sub <- expr_sub[keep_genes, ]
# 
# # Step 5: PCA
# pca <- prcomp(t(expr_sub), scale. = TRUE)
# 
# # Percent variance explained
# percent_var <- round(100 * (pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)), 1)
# 
# # PCA dataframe
# pca_df <- data.frame(
#   sample = rownames(pca$x),
#   PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
#   PC2 = pca$x[, 2]
# )
# 
# # Add disease labels
# metadata_sub$sample <- metadata_sub$title
# pca_df <- merge(pca_df, metadata_sub[, c("sample", "diseasestatus_ch1")], by = "sample")
# 
# # Plot
# pca_plot_ALS <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = diseasestatus_ch1)) +
#   geom_point(size = 3) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c(
#     "Healthy Control" = "green",
#     "ALS" = "purple"
#   )) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   labs(
#     title = "PCA: ALS vs Healthy Control",
#     x = paste0("PC1 (", percent_var[1], "%)"),
#     y = paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)"),
#     color = "Disease"
#   )
# 
# # Save PNG
# ggsave("PCA_plot_ALS.png", plot = pca_plot_ALS, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)


```


## For T1D
```{r}

# Keep only T1D and Healthy Control whole blood samples
metadata_sub <- metadata %>%
  filter(
    diseasestatus_ch1 %in% c("Type 1 Diabetes", "Healthy Control"),
    celltype_ch1 == "Whole Blood"
  )

# Expression matrix without gene_id column
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(counts[, -1])

# Log transform
expr_log <- log2(expr_matrix + 1)

# Keep only selected samples
samples_keep <- metadata_sub$title
expr_sub <- expr_log[, samples_keep]

# Remove zero-variance genes after subsetting
keep_genes <- apply(expr_sub, 1, var) > 0
expr_sub <- expr_sub[keep_genes, ]

# Run PCA
pca <- prcomp(t(expr_sub), scale. = TRUE)

# Percent variance explained
percent_var <- round(100 * (pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)), 1)

# PCA dataframe
pca_df <- data.frame(
  sample = rownames(pca$x),
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2]
)

# Add disease labels
metadata_sub$sample <- metadata_sub$title
pca_df <- merge(pca_df, metadata_sub[, c("sample", "diseasestatus_ch1")], by = "sample")

# Plot
pca_plot_T1D <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = diseasestatus_ch1)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Healthy Control" = "green",
    "Type 1 Diabetes" = "red"
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA: Type 1 Diabetes vs Healthy Control",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", percent_var[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", percent_var[2], "%)"),
    color = "Disease"
  )

# Save PNG
ggsave("PCA_plot_T1D.png", plot = pca_plot_T1D, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Show plot
pca_plot_T1D

```
